description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the monachus/hugo:latest Docker image and sets GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to recursive. Add a pages job that runs the shell command 'hugo --minify && gzip -k -6 $(find public -type f)', publishes the generated public/ directory as an artifact, and is limited to the master branch. Add a test job that runs the command 'hugo --minify' on all branches except master. Both jobs run in the default stage and no additional services, caches, or deployment targets are defined.
